item.title: Didn‘t know that I‘m a Ghost 😂 I used my normal Handycamera. My first thought *did I d!e on my accidend and now I'm here as a ghost?* Then I googled it and it's still weird and idk why but unspectaculary I'm not a manifested ghost #motorbike #bmws1000rr #
item.description: Didn‘t know that I‘m a Ghost 😂 I used my normal Handycamera. My first thought *did I d!e on my accidend and now I'm here as a ghost?* Then I googled it and it's still weird and idk why but unspectaculary I'm not a manifested ghost #motorbike #bmws1000rr #
item.author: law_ya

item.title: I‘m EXCITED! 🫶🏼 The motorbike season in germany officially start this sunday. In every city will be a ride opening and I hope the weather will be good and from now on, it‘s time for more videos! #djiosmo360 #motorcyclecamera #biker #motorbike #bikelife
item.description: I‘m EXCITED! 🫶🏼 The motorbike season in germany officially start this sunday. In every city will be a ride opening and I hope the weather will be good and from now on, it‘s time for more videos! #djiosmo360 #motorcyclecamera #biker #motorbike #bikelife
item.author: law_ya
